description: Letter addressed to ʿUlla ha-Sar ha-Nikhbad b. [...]. In Hebrew (for the poetic opening) and Arabic in Arabic script (for the body). Only the upper right corner is preserved; a few words are missing from the end of each line, and it is not clear how much is missing from the bottom. From what is preserved, the letter seems to consist entirely of flattery and an apology for something.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
